title: Iowa alumni win 2026 Pulitzer Prizes for memoir, fiction
summary_en: Two University of Iowa alumni have won 2026 Pulitzer Prizes, and two more were named finalists — with Yiyun Li and Daniel Kraus joining a distinguished list of more than 40 Iowa-affiliated Pulitzer winners.
title_cn: 爱荷华大学校友获2026年普利策奖回忆录、小说类奖项
